home.mood_tired: Workout adapted for you today. Take care! 💚
home.mood_default: Great! Plan maintained. You're ready for the day! 🔥
home.insight_streak_max: {{streak}} days in a row! 🎉 Tomorrow, consider active rest — a light walk helps recovery.
home.insight_streak_good: {{streak}}-day streak! Keep going, you're building a solid habit. 💪
home.insight_workout_cal: Workout done and nutrition on track! Productive day. Don't forget to hydrate. 💧
home.insight_cal_low: You've barely started eating today. Remember: nutrition is just as important as training. 🥗
home.insight_cal_high: Almost at your calorie goal! Be careful not to overshoot — prefer protein at the end of the day.
home.insight_default: Focus on the process. Every small action today is an investment in tomorrow's results. 🌱
home.no_plan: No plan generated. Go to Diet to create one.
home.coach_sub: Get answers about nutrition, workouts and health
home.report_sub: See your detailed progress this week

subscription.title: NutriAI Premium
subscription.free_days: You have {{days}} days of active Premium.

lgpd_consent.header_sub: Before we start, please confirm each item below.
lgpd_consent.banner_sub: Your health data is classified as sensitive under Brazil's General Data Protection Law. You have the right to access, correct and delete your data at any time.
lgpd_consent.required_msg: To use NutriAI, you must accept the items marked as required, as they are essential for the app to function.
lgpd_consent.error_msg: Could not save your consent. Please try again.
lgpd_consent.decline_confirm_msg: Without accepting the required terms, NutriAI cannot be used, as this data is essential to personalize your health plan.

exercise_gif.not_found_sub: Use the ℹ tip on the workout screen to see text instructions.

exercise_video.hint: Tap a video to watch · Tap outside to close

data_export.title: 📄 Export my data
data_export.sub: You have the right to receive a copy of all data we store about you (LGPD Art. 18).
data_export.full_text: To receive a complete JSON file with your entire history, email us at:
data_export.full_deadline: We'll respond within 15 business days, as required by LGPD.
data_export.alert_footer: For a full export (meals, workouts, history), contact: suporte.nutriai@outlook.com
data_export.error: Could not load your data. Please try again.

privacy_consent.title: 🔒 Manage consents
privacy_consent.sub: Control which data you authorize NutriAI to collect and process, in compliance with LGPD.
privacy_consent.legal:
Privacy questions: suporte.nutriai@outlook.com
We respond within 15 business days (LGPD Art. 18).
privacy_consent.save_error: Could not save. Please try again.
privacy_consent.required_msg: This data is necessary for the app to function. To revoke it, delete your account.
privacy_consent.health_desc: Weight, height, calories and food history to generate your personalized plan.
privacy_consent.photos_desc: Images sent for AI calorie analysis. Not shared with third parties.
privacy_consent.push_desc: Reminders for meals, workouts and streak. You can disable them in your phone settings.
privacy_consent.analytics_desc: Anonymous navigation data to improve the app. No personal data is included.

weekly_feedback.q2_workout_placeholder: E.g.: I couldn't do the Wednesday workout...

optimize.title: 📊 Optimization
optimize.sub: Your metabolism as a logical system
optimize.goal_weeks: At your current pace, you'll reach your goal in {{weeks}} weeks
optimize.pattern1_desc: Your Wed workouts have 18% more load. Schedule your heaviest workout on this day.
optimize.pattern2_desc: Average +280 kcal above target. AI automatically adjusts your Thursday dinner.
optimize.pattern3_desc: Days with < 6h reduce calorie expenditure by ~22%. Correlation: 0.84.
optimize.pattern4_desc: 6 of the last 10 days below 2L. Estimated impact: −5% efficiency.

coop.title: 🤝 Co-op Mode
coop.sub: Take the journey together and double the motivation.
coop.benefit_1: Compare progress with your partner in real time
coop.benefit_4: Send encouragement when your partner needs it
coop.share_msg: Let's make the journey together on NutriAI! 🌿 Use my Co-op code: {{code}}
coop.invalid_code_msg: The code must be in the format NUT-XXXX-XXXX.
coop.not_found_msg: Check the code and try again.
coop.error_join: Could not join Co-op. Please try again.
coop.challenge_desc: Both complete workout and calorie goal for 7 consecutive days.

routine.title: ⚡ Modular Routine
routine.sub: Adapted in real time based on your check-in
routine.ai_care_title: How AI takes care of you
routine.rule1_desc: Today's workout gets lighter and dinner is adjusted for lower calorie burn.
routine.rule2_desc: AI includes a balanced makeup session the next day.
routine.rule3_desc: More challenging workouts are unlocked and a recovery week is suggested.
routine.block_original_text: Original: Chest + Triceps · replaced by check-in
